extract: Ice Beam (Japanese: れいとうビーム Freezing Beam) is a damage-dealing Ice-type move introduced in Generation I. It is: TM13 in Generation I, from Generation III to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl, as well as in Pokémon Legends: Z-A. TM55 in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. TR05 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM135 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet.
